notes: Describes the method of wounding tissue such as airbrush or dremel
Coral number arbitrarily given to each colony for identification and either a (airbrush) or b (dremel) to indicate wounding treatment. All numbers represent paired colony fragments

If the wound showed characteristics of healing such as polyps or coenosarc regaining pigment. Healing is described as no (no coloration changes from previous image), incomplete (outer borders show pigment but center is not fully healed), or yes (wound area shows complete pigment recovery)
If debris of any kind. is present in the wounded area it is denoted as either yes (present) or no (absent)
